message:
fix(fcp-sandbox): propagate landlock/seccomp errors and fix normalize_path parent-dir handling

Harden Linux sandbox setup to propagate all landlock_add_rule,
landlock_restrict_self, PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS, and PR_SET_SECCOMP failures
as io::Errors instead of silently ignoring them. Previously, sandbox
setup failures were swallowed, allowing processes to run unsandboxed.

Fix normalize_path to correctly handle parent-dir (..) components at
filesystem root (no-op) and in relative paths without normal components
to pop (preserves the ..).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
